prompt: A highly detailed, cinematic portrait of a young woman with dark hair in an updo and pale skin, wearing a futuristic black trench coat with silver metallic accents, tactical belts, and a holstered sci-fi pistol. The scene is set inside a spaceship command center with cool blue lighting reflecting off her metallic gear. Through a large window in the background, a starry space environment with a fleet of spaceships is visible. The image features photorealistic textures, dramatic lighting, and a high-tech sci-fi aesthetic.
